name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: the meaning of Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

Working-class people are the backbone of our country.

Labor Day is a commemoration of those workers, serving as a recognition of the work we’ve had to do to get to where we are today. But as I reflect on the meaning of Labor Day this year, I also recognize that so much more work needs to be done.

We can’t write about Labor Day without recognizing that it started as a labor rights movement.

As the Gilded Age exposed a historic wage gap, workers fought back. They were the workers and unions that centuries ago laid the groundwork for why we have weekends and a federal minimum wage.

And today, as this pandemic exposes what was always true -- that our economy isn’t working for working people -- workers and unions are once again fighting back. They wake up for work every day in the midst of a pandemic, and with the responsibility of keeping our lives running on their shoulders, they’re continuing the fight for better working conditions.

We need you in that fight, friend . Add your name here to stand with our workers as we navigate this crisis together.

Stand with our workers » https://secure.ngpvan.com/RgF6XAznsk-My-8s_vWsSg2

As public servants and candidates for higher office, it is our job to uplift our workers. It’s our civic duty to bring their fight to Washington and champion the causes that they’re upholding: better health care, better wages, and the protections they need to do their jobs safely.

As this pandemic threatens to upend what it means to be an American worker, my promise to you as a candidate for higher office is that I will always champion those causes. I will uplift the working-class families in our community and fight to ensure that the solutions for the issues at stake for them meet this critical moment -- and I will continue to build the grassroots movement I know can deliver the change our community needs.

This Labor Day, I’m asking you to join that fight. This pandemic has changed our lives and livelihoods -- and we need our government to champion the causes we believe in. Add your name to stand with our workers

Stand with our workers » https://secure.ngpvan.com/RgF6XAznsk-My-8s_vWsSg2

I’m grateful to uplift the voices of our community as I seek election -- and I promise that, in Congress, I will continue fighting hard for our community and the workers that move us forward.

Thanks,
Sri

Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_pet_2020.09.07_b1_s_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at sri2020.com [https://sri2020.com/]
Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/77698aee-49f1-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74/1b9baba7-56f1-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjliYWJhNy01NmYxLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mpApLPJTtl-k-IAo6oDvvjXzUKepsMLxrayfexbNCQU=&id=117373579 .

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Peter, will you join me in supporting an economy that works for everyone?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
As some folks are enjoying a day off, we have to address the elephant in the room: |
---
Peter,

As some folks are enjoying a day off, we have to address the elephant in the room: _America has been knocked down._

This pandemic has stretched so many families to their breaking point, with unemployment numbers climbing and millions of people seeing their hours, wages, and health care cut.

It has also laid bare some unacceptable truths -- that too many families were already struggling to make ends meet, and too many parents were worried about the economic future for their children.

It forced us to reckon with the truth that Black and Latino Americans, Native Americans, immigrants, and women have never been welcomed as full participants in the economy.

**The weight of this crisis calls for more than a plan to restore our economy to its previous state, with its structural weaknesses and inequalities still in place -- we must imagine and build a new American economy for our families and the next generation. Good-paying jobs are a floor, not a ceiling.**

That means we're not just going to build back to where we were before Trump, we're going to _build back better_ and create an economy where America's working families have the tools, choices, and freedom they need to get ahead.

Peter, that's exactly what Joe's Build Back Better plan will do -- **and we're going to get to work for you on Day One of our administration to get the job done.**

[But, today, I want to know if you're with us. If you support our plan to create millions of good-paying union jobs and build an economy where every American is in on the deal, will you add your name to support our Build Back Better plan today?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/35705522/824009663/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/PET-build-back-better?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.09.07_B2_BBBpet_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.09.07_B2_BBBpet_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/35705522/824009663/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/PET-build-back-better?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.09.07_B2_BBBpet_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.09.07_B2_BBBpet_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
---
Peter, you can read more about Joe's plan [here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/35705521/824009663/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/build-back-better/?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.09.07_B2_BBBpet_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.09.07_B2_BBBpet_X__F1_S2_C1__full") \-- but here's what I'll share with you for now:

We're going to mobilize American ingenuity to create millions of green jobs and fight climate change through a clean energy revolution.

We're going to bring critical supply chains back and mobilize American manufacturing and innovation so that the future is made in America.

We're going to build a 21st-century caregiving and education workforce, helping ease the burden of care for working parents, especially women.

And we're going to mobilize across the board to advance racial equity in America by fighting to close the racial wealth gap, expanding affordable housing, and investing in Black, Latino, and Native American entrepreneurs and communities.

This plan will also ensure jobs are high-paying jobs that provide a choice to join a union.

**It's a bold plan, Peter, but it's one that absolutely meets the moment we find ourselves in today -- and it's the least we can do for all of the workers who have so faithfully brought us through the darkest moments of this pandemic.**

[So, Peter, before you close your inbox today, I want to hear from you directly. Do you support Joe's and my plan to build back a better American economy where no one gets left behind? Add your name below if you stand with us in this important moment.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/35705522/824009663/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/PET-build-back-better?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.09.07_B2_BBBpet_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.09.07_B2_BBBpet_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/35705522/824009663/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/PET-build-back-better?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.09.07_B2_BBBpet_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.09.07_B2_BBBpet_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
---
Thank you, Peter.

For The People,

Kamala Harris
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/35705520/824009663/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/3570551f/824009663/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/3570551e/824009663/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/3570551d/824009663/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/3570551c/824009663/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/3570551b/824009663/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/3570551a/824009663/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/35705519/824009663/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/35705518/824009663/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/35705517/824009663/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/3570551a/824009663/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/35705516/824009663/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/35705519/824009663/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b245/1cd0ac28/15d83eadc/35705515/824009663/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: LISA SCHELLER ENDORSED BY THE FRATERNAL ORDER OF POLICE LE-HAMPTON LODGE 35
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
LISA SCHELLER ENDORSED BY THE FRATERNAL ORDER OF POLICE LE-HAMPTON LODGE 35

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Brooke Race

Info@schellerforcongress.com

Allentown, Pa. – Today, the Scheller Campaign is honored to receive the
unanimous endorsement from the 700 members of Le-Hampton Lodge 35 Fraternal
Order Of Police. The FOP is a fraternal organization consisting of sworn law
enforcement officers in the United States. This endorsement is a testament to
the fact that Lisa has shown that she will truly stand up and support our law
enforcement. While Lisa’s opponent, Susan Wild, wants to risk our safety and
the security of Pennsylvania families by defunding and dismantling the police.

Lisa released the following statement after the endorsement:

“I am honored to receive this endorsement from FOP Lodge 35. The law
enforcement community has my complete support. I promise to stand up for those
who continue to excel in making the Lehigh Valley a safe place to live for us
and our families. We can not allow the streets to be filled with chaos and
lawlessness. Thank you to the FOP for putting your faith in me to defend PA07
as you continue to risk your lives to guard and protect all of us - I will not
let you down once I’m in Congress like our current representative has.”

Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc.
Unsubscribe

clean_body: | | | | Peter, With the general election getting closer and closer, my team is working hard to find ways for YOU to get involved in the campaign at home! We’ve added a on our website with graphics that you can download to share on your own social media! There are three designs for you to choose from! Be sure to if you haven’t yet done so by If you’ve with our campaign and share one of these graphics with #TeamRonchetti and we may retweet or share your post! Posting on social media is one of the best ways to raise awareness about our campaign! The more people who are enthusiastic about our movement, the more people who will show up to vote in November. Please help spread the word by posting about your support for our campaign, keep sharing our posts and videos, and encourage your friends to sign-up and follow along by sending them directing them to our. Be the one who steps up and shares our campaign with ten new people! It would mean the world to me. Thank you, Mark PS: If you’re interested in other ways to help our campaign from home, please contact our political director, Matthew, at mailto:matthew@markronchetti.com?subject=Campaign for Mark from Home&body= or sign up , and we’ll get you set up. It’s an easy fun way to help us talk to voters and share our conservative message across the state! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO =

name: Corky Messner
subject: Click here to find your voting location!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Do you know where to vote tomorrow?
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/40e86bac2f5cbd0c/670d8f3751efe63dc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, I don’t want to interrupt your Labor Day, so I’ll make this quick. I wouldn’t have sent this at all, but tomorrow is the New Hampshire Primary, and I wanted to make sure you know where to go to cast your vote! **Please click here and bookmark the page so that you can easily find your polling location tomorrow:[https://vote.corkyforsenate.com/](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/40e86bac2f5cbd0c/82e2ed76a71e5028c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** I hope that you’ve been able to take time today to spend with your family, and I hope everyone makes their voice heard at the ballot box tomorrow! Thanks for your support,

clean_body: Do you know where to vote tomorrow? Peter, I don’t want to interrupt your Labor Day, so I’ll make this quick. I wouldn’t have sent this at all, but tomorrow is the New Hampshire Primary, and I wanted to make sure you know where to go to cast your vote! Please click here and bookmark the page so that you can easily find your polling location tomorrow: I hope that you’ve been able to take time today to spend with your family, and I hope everyone makes their voice heard at the ballot box tomorrow! Thanks for your support, Corky Messner | | | ---|--- id:2020-08-27-14:09:11:786t PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE

**Fact:** Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent more to defeat Jon Ossoff than any other Democratic Senate candidate.

**Fact:** Jon's campaign isn't taking ANY contributions from corporate PACs or Congressional lobbyists.

**Fact:** Democrats need to net FOUR SEATS to take control of the U.S. Senate, and Jon's race is critical to removing Mitch McConnell from power.

**Friend, Jon is on track to win in Georgia and give Democrats a Senate majority, and the GOP is terrified.**

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo
subject: Tomorrow: a free drive-in movie for a good cause!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
We want you to make sure you could be among the first in the world to see the documentary ALL IN: THE FIGHT FOR DEMOCRACY. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ac/34a064cc/1bddbab7/702da79/404649609/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Dear Friend - We want you to make sure you could be among the **first in the world** to see the documentary **ALL IN: THE FIGHT FOR DEMOCRACY.**

We are delighted to invite you to the 3 premieres in Georgia TOMORROW, Tuesday, September 8th! Tickets are free, but you must register in advance. These are all drive-in movies, and one "ticket" is good for one car. _Tuesday, September 8 at 8:30 pm_
* **Atlanta, GA** \- Atlanta Starlight 6 Drive-In
* **Jesup, GA** \- Jesup Drive-In
* **Statesboro, GA** - Bulloch County Agricultural Complex

This is a great way to get out and see an important movie with your family about the history of the vote and voter suppression with an inspiring call to action, all from the safe distance of your car in a drive-in, at no cost!

_**9/8 Premiere Details & RSVP:**_ [www.ALLINforVotingPremiere.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ac/34a064cc/1bddbab7/702da86/404649609/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://www.ALLINforVotingPremiere.com") _**Film Website with Trailer and Additional Details:**_
[www.ALLINforVoting.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ac/34a064cc/1bddbab7/702da87/404649609/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://www.ALLINforVoting.com")

_**Film Synopsis:**_
In anticipation of the 2020 presidential election, _ALL IN: THE FIGHT FOR DEMOCRACY_ examines the often overlooked, yet insidious issue of voter suppression in the United States. The film interweaves personal experiences with current activism and historical insight to expose a problem that has corrupted our democracy from the very beginning. With the perspective and expertise of Stacey Abrams, the former Minority Leader of the Georgia House of Representatives, the documentary offers an insider's look into laws and barriers to voting that most people don't even know are threats to their basic rights as citizens of the United States. -Lauren
---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ac/34a064cc/1bddbab7/702da84/404649609/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ac/34a064cc/1bddbab7/702da85/404649609/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ac/34a064cc/1bddbab7/702da82/404649609/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: My dad was a union ironworker
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b272/18e32a7f/4a53e46c/7b20f1bd/3193205043/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "http://www.benraylujan.com/")

| | Hi there,

Happy Labor Day! I hope you and your family are enjoying a well-deserved day of rest. If you're spending the day as one of the millions of essential workers keeping our economy running, thank you for your service.

Growing up, I learned about the importance of worker power from my dad, a union ironworker. Throughout his life, dad fought to make sure workers like him would have the protections and compensation they deserve -- and he taught me to do the same.

After working with dangerous chemicals during his ironworking days, my dad developed lung cancer, even though he'd never smoked a day in his life. Dad's illness and death was a reminder that without robust protections for workers, even those who do the right thing can suffer.

**And under Republican control of the Senate and the White House, working people __are__ suffering.** President Trump has rolled back workplace safety protections, attacked our labor unions, and blocked hazard pay for essential workers. Meanwhile, the corporations that support his campaign are making record profits.

Four months ago, I flew to Washington D.C. to vote for the HEROES Act, a stimulus package that would extend federal unemployment aid, expand paid family leave, provide hazard pay for essential workers, and provide direct stimulus payments to our families.

But instead of holding a vote on the HEROES Act, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans went on vacation. **To achieve real change for American workers, we _must_ flip the Senate this fall.**

Working families deserve leaders who will stand up for them -- and when I'm in the Senate, I'll fight every day to build an economy that works for all of us.

In solidarity,

Ben Ray Lujan |
---
[](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b272/18e32a7f/4a53e46c/7b20f1b2/3193205043/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b272/18e32a7f/4a53e46c/7b20f1b3/3193205043/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b272/18e32a7f/4a53e46c/7b20f1b0/3193205043/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As the U.S. House Representative from New Mexico's Third District, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by the American Federation of Teachers, Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b272/18e32a7f/4a53e46c/7b20f1b1/3193205043/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.numero.ai/contribute/peopleforben?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=auto")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b272/18e32a7f/4a53e46c/7b20f1b6/3193205043/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b272/18e32a7f/4a53e46c/7b20f1b7/3193205043/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b272/18e32a7f/4a53e46c/7b20f1b3/3193205043/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b272/18e32a7f/4a53e46c/7b20f1b4/3193205043/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

| | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.
---

| Friends, Tomorrow is the day --**The Republican Primary Election here in New Hampshire is tomorrow, Tuesday Sept 8th!** When you enter that voting booth I hope that you will remember one thing: **Put New Hampshire First.** I am proud to the be the only true New Hampshire conservative in this race. I am proud of the 650 New Hampshire Republican leaders that have endorsed my campaign, including Senator John Sununu, two NH Governors, two NH Congressmen, two Manchester Mayors, and many, many more. I am proud that more than 90% of our donors are from right here in the Granite State - **I don't owe any favors to any out of state special interests or anti-2A activist governors**. I promise that if I am the Republican nominee, **I will be the toughest possible candidate that Chris Pappas has ever faced and we will win in November! **
Please vote tomorrow and please put New Hampshire first. Vote Mayberry for Congress! Thank you, Matt

subject: Virginia, Mark Warner and the future of the Senate

Derek,

I’ve said it over and over again — **_there’s nothing more important for Virginia than making sure Mark Warner wins his reelection fight this November._**
Let’s start with what you already know:
Mark is an incredible Senator. He fights for an economy that works for all Virginians. He’s been a fierce advocate for Virginia’s health care and he’s made us proud leading the Senate investigation into Donald Trump’s corrupt 2016 campaign.
Those are all great reasons to support Mark, but here’s another:
**If Mark loses Democrats have no chance to take back the Senate. ZERO. That means Mitch McConnell stays in power and the Senate will continue to get nothing done at a critical moment for our country.**
I don’t have to tell you what a disaster that is. That’s why I’m asking for your help.
**[Can you donate anything you can afford and show your support for Mark’s campaign? Virginia and our nation’s future are counting on it.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zne8xlHiDjtT1hmFVM1zw1qPFQXRKbS51wdEXwfbeJ3n0ag0ENVQ7DzWDOAgrV97Tv7AMTFlyf-8KCSW1VMoclhR6bFrzd8c2CzP2iUhVcbSqNCQJoUSrgXfC3lddldwcXgqwBSZuGX1O46TTJdNcQWBPhQBEw97ntvK3fARjxhg7r7m_UVDoULhzz5MvYzxaukv0RIPbc2cXswvxg0R3Bt9TGqfNqpQkdlTqMjgduU-5eX3-aQpuPhyeeJHhmsGL6GfZ-hdkO6b14Cy17mjT-ok0xg1f3Welq4qRn-MufpOx6hTdYXD4xiIBEV4lIBszOnxz-4bNtWu-GLYZRuN19ek1-6v0LfHgAqYV1JnmCJOpi4qckVZ_yey7vZi1kxStCeo9hnCPB94fAYTny44jP/34z/Avr-UyLWRquiMiKvlBQ7eA/h2/bN11VKq4BQhu3-jgfWrAD4KoJp3z6I1CZI-QiTmksrk)**
Thanks,
Terry

name: Team Warner
subject: Mark Warner and Tim Kaine virtual event
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Senators Mark Warner and Tim Kaine are looking forward to answering your questions about their legislative priorities and the issues affecting you and your loved ones.
|
---

| | Derek --

Senators Mark Warner and Tim Kaine are teaming up for a virtual town hall event **this Thursday, September 10th** to answer your questions about coronavirus relief and other issues facing Virginians during the pandemic. All are welcome to join! Here are the details:
| **Facebook Live Town Hall with Senators Mark Warner and Tim Kaine**
Thursday, September 10th, 2020
6:30 PM ET
**[Click here to RSVP](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daed/53d9897e/55c057e5/1c8807c6/3786832577/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/318609/")**
---

Senators Mark Warner and Tim Kaine are looking forward to answering your questions about their legislative priorities and the issues affecting you and your loved ones.

Although this event is hosted on Facebook, you do **not** need a Facebook account to access the town hall. If you already have a question for Mark Warner or Tim Kaine, you can respond directly to this email, or submit your question through Facebook during the event. They will get to as many questions as they can during the event.

We hope you'll join us! [**Click here to sign up.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daed/53d9897e/55c057e5/1c8807c6/3786832577/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/318609/")
Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daed/53d9897e/55c057e5/1c8807c5/3786832577/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc2MiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200907_f_1762__&refcode2=cont&amount=")****
---
|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daed/53d9897e/55c057e5/1c8807c4/3786832577/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

[Peter, we're in the final phase of this election, and we're running out of time to make the big investments that will shape the outcome of this race.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.07_B4_alleyes_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.07_B4_alleyes_X__F1_S1_C1__nd")

Post-Labor Day is when folks really start to pay attention to the election, and when undecided voters begin to finalize who they're going to vote for.

But this election is going to look so different from any we've seen before -- we're expecting _more voters than ever_ will cast mail-in ballots and take advantage of early voting due to the pandemic.

Peter, that means we've got to divert resources to our Get Out the Vote efforts much earlier than in previous elections -- and we don't have much time to do it.

[Voters in critical states like Minnesota, Virginia, and Michigan will begin voting in just a few days, and our window for reaching these voters is closing rapidly.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.07_B4_alleyes_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.07_B4_alleyes_X__F1_S1_C1__nd")

That's why we're asking you to make your first contribution today, Peter. We said from day one of this campaign that it would take all of us pitching in to defeat Trump, and Joe and Kamala need you to step up.

[Can we count on you to chip in and fuel our campaign over these next, crucial days? If you want your $25 to make the most impact to defeat Donald Trump, we urge you to give now and not a moment later.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.07_B4_alleyes_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.07_B4_alleyes_X__F1_S1_C1__nd")
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b25a/1cd0ac28/15df2d2b0/35705e8f/1065389951/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b25a/1cd0ac28/15df2d2b0/35705e8d/1065389951/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b25a/1cd0ac28/15df2d2b0/35705e8b/1065389951/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b25a/1cd0ac28/15df2d2b0/35705e89/1065389951/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b25a/1cd0ac28/15df2d2b0/35705e87/1065389951/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b25a/1cd0ac28/15df2d2b0/35705e8d/1065389951/VEsEAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b25a/1cd0ac28/15df2d2b0/35705e85/1065389951/VEsEDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b25a/1cd0ac28/15df2d2b0/35705e8b/1065389951/VEsEDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b25a/1cd0ac28/15df2d2b0/35705e84/1065389951/VEsFBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
